content:
Input
* Please add "[[n]]" after "integer".

Output
* Please change both instances of "n" to "[[n]]".

Constraints
* Please rewrite the constraint as:
4 ≤ [[n]] ≤ 10

Cases
* Each test and its validator should cover the same scenario (both using small odd [[n]], both using large even [[n]], etc.) but with slightly different inputs. Please revise all the cases so that there are no duplicates and each pair represents the same scenario.

Thanks.

P.S. I found similar clashes, but their scope is a bit different:

* odd [[n]] only: https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/98421eebdf8a4332fac37966058c862ddb849

* spiral not necessarily square: https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/2265e12541debc184a9962bf2735a664315

Hopefully, this contribution (after modifications based on the comments above) will help fill the current gap.
